corpus.attested_text: Arma virumque canō, Trōiae quī prīmus ab ōrīs
corpus.attested_text_spoken: Arma virumque cano, Troiae qui primus ab oris
corpus.translation: I sing of arms and the man, who first from the shores of Troy…
